summary: Financial Institutions insurance covering banks, asset managers, insurers, and other regulated financial entities for professional liability, crime, D&O, and E&O risks. Bespoke combined policy structures common in the London Market.

schemaEntities.description: FI entity. Custom: InstitutionType, FCA_FirmRef, PRA_Regulated, TotalAssets, AUM_GBP, CustomerCount, TradeFinanceFlag, DerivativesExposure, CapitalAdequacyRatio, SMFHolders, BaselClassification, ResolutionPlanRequired.
109 rules: PRA regulated entity loadings, FCA FirmRef live validation, Basel classification-based exposure adjustments, SMCR/SMF holder count checks, systemic importance indicator triggers.

relationships.note: BBB limit driven by total assets and Basel classification
FCA/PRA regulatory validation rules are hard underwriting stops

migrationIssues.detail: FCA FirmRef and PRA regulation status require live FCA/PRA register API lookups. No GW Cloud native integration -- new regulatory API connectors required.
Basel I/II/III/IV classification-based exposure and capital adequacy adjustments. Custom Gosu calculation -- GW Cloud rating rules can support with significant configuration.
Senior Managers and Certification Regime holder count validation. FCA SMCR register integration required -- no GW Cloud native support.
BBB + E&O + D&O + Cyber combined policy structure with shared aggregate limits. GW Cloud multi-line support requires custom aggregate limit coordinator.

cloudMapping.action: FCA Financial Services Register API integration required
Custom extension field required -- Basel classification TypeKey
FCA SMCR register integration for SMF holder count validation
